title: Electric Self Stirring Mug 500mAh Rechargeable Automatic Mixing with Magnetic Stirring Bar 400ml Auto Magnetic Mixing Cup with Handle 304 Stainless Steel Self Stirring Coffee Mug for Home Office
description:
About this item
[Rechargeable Electric Self Stirring Mug] This electric self mixing mug has a built-in 500mAh battery, you just need to use the USB cable to recharge it in 3 hours to meet your daily use needs.
[Automatic Mixing Mug with Magnetic Stirring Bar] This automatic mixing mug is equipped with a magnetic stirring stick, which can be firmly attached to the bottom of the cup, no need to worry about the magnetic stirring stick falling off when you are adding boiled water or swirling it around, which effectively avoids the risk of accidental ingestion.
[Electric Self Stirring Mug] This electric self-stirring mug comes with a magnetic stirring bar that runs at high speed to evenly blend drinks, perfect for blending coffee, tea, hot chocolate, milk, protein shakes, lemonade, gravy, and many other light blended beverages that can be stirred.
[Food Grade 304 Stainless Steel] This stirring cup is of food grade 304 stainless steel, rust-proof and durable. It is of double-layer stainless steel and vacuum isolation technology inside and outside the cup, no need to worry about leaking or scalding.
[Widely Used] This magnetic stirring cup measures 6.4 x 8.5 x 13.5 cm / 2.5 x 3.3 x 5.3 inches, with a compact appearance, it is perfect for use in the kitchen, living room, bedroom, office, gym or school. It can help you stir hot or cold drinks quickly.
